childSafety.intro: Therr is committed to the safety and protection of all users, especially children. We maintain a zero-tolerance policy toward child sexual abuse and exploitation (CSAE) on our platform.
childSafety.zeroToleranceDescription: Therr strictly prohibits any content that exploits or endangers children, including child sexual abuse material (CSAM), grooming, sextortion, and any other form of child exploitation. Any account found creating, sharing, or distributing such content will be immediately terminated.

prevention.contentModeration: We employ content moderation practices to detect and remove prohibited content.
prevention.reporting: Users can report child safety concerns directly within the app using the in-app reporting feature.
prevention.accountActions: Accounts that violate our child safety policies are immediately suspended and permanently banned.
prevention.lawEnforcement: We cooperate fully with law enforcement investigations related to child exploitation.
prevention.ncmec: We report all apparent CSAM to the National Center for Missing & Exploited Children (NCMEC) as required by law.

childSafety.reportingInApp: If you encounter content or behavior that endangers a child, please report it immediately using the in-app reporting tools available on all content and user profiles.
childSafety.reportingEmail: You may also report child safety concerns directly via email at
childSafety.complianceDescription: Therr complies with all relevant child safety laws and regulations. We report to regional and national authorities, including NCMEC, in accordance with applicable legal requirements.
childSafety.contactDescription: For questions or concerns about our child safety practices, please contact us at

deleteAccount.description: We're sorry to see you go. If you'd like to delete your Therr account and all associated data, you can do so using one of the options below.
deleteAccount.optionMobileTitle: Option 1: Delete via the Mobile App

steps.openApp: Open the Therr app on your mobile device.

deleteAccount.emailInstructions: Send an email from the address associated with your account to
deleteAccount.dataDeletedDescription: When you delete your account, the following data will be permanently removed:

dataItems.profile: Your profile information (name, email, bio, profile photo)

deleteAccount.retentionNote: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Some anonymized data may be retained for legal or regulatory purposes as described in our Privacy Policy.

home.pageTitle: Create your Social Profile or Business
home.welcome: Discover Local. Earn Rewards. Make Real Connections.
home.info: Therr connects you with the people, places, and businesses in your neighborhood. Share location-based posts, discover hidden gems nearby, and earn rewards just for exploring your community.
home.info2: Local influencer or content creator? Partner with nearby businesses, grow your audience, and land paid collaborations — all through the app.
home.info3: Download the free app to unlock the full experience.

createProfile.infoTitle: Why We Verify Your Phone Number
createProfile.info: Your security matters to us. Phone verification helps us keep the community authentic and free from fake accounts. Combined with email and location-based safeguards, it ensures you're connecting with real people in a trusted environment.

goMobile.subtitle: Discover local people, places, and moments — right from your browser. See what's happening around you and connect with your community. Get the mobile app for the full experience on the go.

explore.title: Explore Nearby
explore.description: See trending posts and discover what people are sharing in your neighborhood.

locations.title: Find Local Spots
locations.description: Discover local businesses, events, and hidden gems near you.

moments.title: View Moments

connect.title: Meet People Nearby
connect.description: Connect with people who share your interests in your area.

goMobile.ctaInfo: Like what you see? The mobile app goes further — with real-time location discovery, check-in rewards, and notifications for nearby deals. Download for free and never miss what's happening around you.
